zh.lifeSummary: John B Peacock於1615年5月18日出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其。他於大約1640年與Joyce Susan Webber在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1670年10月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特享年55歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John B Peacock于1615年5月18日出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其。他于大约1640年与Joyce Susan Webber在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1670年10月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特享年55岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Peacock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pecock, pacok, pocok, Old English pēacocc ‘peacock’. It could be used as a personal name or as a nickname for one ‘as proud as a peacock’. Compare Paw , Pay . This surname is widespread in England and southern Scotland, and is also established in Ireland. Compare Pea .

variants.name: Pavone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gaetano, Luca, Luigi, Nicola, Antonio, Biagio, Carmelo, Concetta, Cono, Cosmo, Gino.
from pavone ‘peacock’, used as a nickname for a proud or vain man, and also as a personal name. Compare Peacock .

variants.name: Paw
meanings: Burmese (Karen): from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, from hpaw ‘flower’. — Note: Since Karens do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Peak
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in different parts of England named in Old English with pēac ‘hill, knoll, peak’, includingPeak (Hill) in Sidmouth (Devon), East and West Peek in Luffincot (Devon), a minor locality in Chiddingly (Sussex) once called Peke (now Peke's House), and the Peak District, an area of rugged hills in northwest Derbyshire and adjacent counties.
English: possibly a nickname from the Middle English word in 1 above, denoting a stout, thick-set man.

variants.name: Pea
meanings: nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

variants.name: Peyman
meanings: from Middle English pe, pey, pay ‘peacock’ + man, perhaps a nickname denoting a dandy or an occupational name for someone who bred peacocks for a rich man's garden or dinner table. Compare Peacock , Peabody .
alternatively, the surname could mean ‘Pey's servant’, from the Middle English personal name Pey + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Peaco
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Peacock  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John B Peacock was born on 18 May 1615, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. He married Joyce Susan Webber about 1640, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died on 30 October 1670, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 55, and was buried in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

Er hat um 1640 in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Joyce Susan Webber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb am 30. it.lifeSummary: John B Peacock è nato il il 18 maggio 1615 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. Lui sposato Joyce Susan Webber circa 1640, nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1670, nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John B Peacockは1615年5月18日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた。約1640年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードでJoyce Susan Webberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1670年10月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードで55歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John B Peacock(은)는 1615년 5월 18일 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1640년 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 Joyce Susan Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1670년 10월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John B Peacock nasceu em 18 de maio de 1615, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Joyce Susan Webber aproximadamente 1640, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1670, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: John B Peacock родился 18 мая 1615 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce Susan Webber около 1640 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер 30 октября 1670 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: John B Peacock nació el 18 de mayo de 1615, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Joyce Susan Webber aproximadamente 1640, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1670, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
